title: Create: Delivery Director [Discontinued]
description: Adds a bunch of new features for Create Packages
body:
Create: Delivery Director is a mod incentrated on adding new utilities for Create packages.

**Package Re-Writer**
The package re-writer (as shown in his dedicated ponder scene), allows to manipulate the address of packages. You can use a regex expression to replace text in the original address
